message:
feat(abi): nativize 8 public res_* DNS API as forwarders to __res_* GCT

res_mkquery, res_nmkquery, res_nquery, res_nquerydomain, res_nsearch,
res_nsend, res_querydomain, res_send now forward to their __res_*
counterparts instead of independent dlsym_passthrough.
dlsym_passthrough count in glibc_internal_abi: 25→17 (hard floor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
